label: 💡 Lighting
info:
## 💡 Lighting Automations

### Motion-Based
- **Linen Closet** — Motion → light on; auto-off after 90s
- **Kitchen Motion** — Motion → light on; auto-off after 90s
- **Kitchen Sink** — Motion-triggered with brightness by time of day
- **Basement** — Door open → lights on; door close → off after 10 min delay

### Schedule-Based
- **Front Porch** — On at sunset, off at 3:00 AM
- **Living Room** — On at sunset, brightness gradually reduced over evening
- **Kitchen Overhead + Casual Dining** — On at sunset
- **Bedroom Overhead** — On at 9:30 PM
- **Office Lights** — On on weekdays only

### Presence-Based
- **Foyer** — Lights on when a person returns home after being away

### Midnight Reset
- All lights (except bathroom & porch) turned off at midnight if still on
- Bambu P1S chamber light is skipped if a print job is active (running, prepare, slicing, or paused)

### Notes
- Brightness levels adjust based on time of day for most automations
- Sunset-triggered automations cancel if already past sunset at deploy time

label: Backyard Porch Lights
info:
## Backyard Porch Light Automation

### Behavior
- Door opens at night → lights on (only if currently off)
- Door closes → 10-min delay → lights off (only if automation turned them on)
- Door left open > 5 min → Telegram alert

label: 🐕 Dog
info:
## 🐕 Dog Feeding Tracker

Tracks Gabby's 🦴 feeding schedule via the dog food container sensor.

### Sections
1. 🍖 **Feeding Detection** — Container open → time-range → MQTT publish
2. ⏰ **Reminders** — 11:00 AM / 8:00 PM checks with Telegram alerts
3. ✅ **Follow-up** — "Gabby has been fed now" after a reminder was sent
4. 🌙 **Midnight Reset** — Clears MQTT topics and reminder flags
5. 🌐 **HTTP API** — GET /dog-feed-status returns JSON status
6. 🚨 **Error Handling** — Catch-all with debug logging

label: 🧊 Fridge/Freezer Monitor v2
info:
Monitors Acurite 986 sensors via RTL_433/tartlet.

Freezer: Warning >10°F (10min), Critical >20°F (6min)
Fridge: Warning >50°F (10min), Critical >60°F (6min)
Stale: Alert if no sensor update in 30 minutes

All alerts sent via Telegram to both chat IDs.

label: 🎄 Seasonal
info:
🎄 Holiday lighting automation 🎄

Configurable date range via flow context variables:
  holidayStartMonth (default: 11)
  holidayStartDay (default: 25)
  holidayEndMonth (default: 1)
  holidayEndDay (default: 6)

Devices:
  🎄 Christmas Tree (light.christmas_tree_2)
  ✨ Outdoor Lights (switch.seasonal_lights)

label: 🔔 Notifications
info:
## 🔔 Notifications

### Frigate Camera Alerts
Monitors Frigate camera events for person/dog detections at the
front door and doorbell cameras. Groups detections within a 2s
window, debounces to 30s, fetches snapshots, and sends photo
messages via Telegram to the family.

### Door & Gate Alerts
- **Front door opened** — sets a flow flag for 7s (used by camera
  alerts to contextualize person/dog detections as departures)
- **Back gate opened** — immediate Telegram alert
- **Main gate open > 30 min** — Telegram alert

### Battery Level Endpoint
HTTP GET `/battery_levels` — returns HTML list of all battery
sensor levels.

label: 🔒 Locks
info:
## 🔒 Locks

### Scheduled Nightly Lock (9:00 PM)
Checks both front and back doors — if closed, locks them.

### Auto-Lock on Door Close
When the front door closes, checks if auto-lock is enabled
(`input_boolean.front_door_autolock`). If so, locks after a
5-minute delay.

### Manual Trigger
Inject node to manually fire the lock-check sequence.

label: 📍 Presence
info:
## 📍 Presence

### Cliff & Alison
MQTT topics `presence/cliff` and `presence/alison` → updates
Home Assistant `person.*` entity state (home/away) and
entity picture (color when home, B&W when away).

### Cameron (Guest Mode)
Reads iCal calendar entries tagged "Cameron". If there are 2+
events today (indicating a sleepover), sets
`input_boolean.cameron_mode` on; otherwise turns it off.
Runs on a schedule and on demand.

label: 📱 Telegram
info:
## 📱 Telegram Bot Commands

- **/doors** — Status of all locks, doors, and backyard gates
- **/lock** `<location>` — Lock a door (Front Door / Back Door)
- **/unlock** `<location>` — Unlock a door (Front Door / Back Door)
- **/lockall** — Lock all locks, then report status
- **/stalker** — Toggle front door snapshot notifications on/off
- **/help** — Show available commands

label: ☕ Morning Routine
info:
## ☕ Morning Routine

### Kettle Automation
Automatically turns on the Fellow Stagg kettle when closet motion
is detected in the morning, as a proxy for waking up and getting dressed.

**Trigger:** Bedroom closet motion sensor active for 2s
**Window:** 6:00 AM – 11:00 AM only
**Guards:**
- Skips if `coffee_made` flag is already on
- Skips if kettle is already on
- 60s debounce to prevent rapid re-triggers

**Flow:**
1. Motion detected → check if coffee already made
2. Check kettle state → turn ON if off
3. Verify kettle turned on (up to 3 retries with backoff)
4. Set `coffee_made` flag → start 45-min safety auto-off timer
5. Notify via HA if retries exhausted or safety shutoff fires

### Daily Reset
- `coffee_made` flag cleared at 3:00 AM each night

label: ✅ Todoist
info:
## ✅ Todoist Integrations

### Weekly Fitness Task Updates (Mondays at 1:00 AM)
- **Push-ups** — Increments the target count by 1 each week
- **Plank** — Increments the target duration by 1 second each week

### Daily Ingress Task Updates (Every day at 1:00 AM)
Fetches yesterday's stats from agent-stats.com, then updates
tasks in the Todoist Ingress project:
- **Reclaimer** — Updates target portal count (+35/day)
- **Hacker** — Updates target hack count (+150/day)

label: 🔵 Ingress
info:
## 🟢 Ingress Scout Tracking

Tracks Ingress Scout and Scout Controller scan counts, synced
daily with Google Sheets.

### Daily Sync (1:00 AM)
1. Fetch latest stats from agent-stats.com
2. Compare to current Google Sheets values
3. If Scout count increased, update the sheet

### Daily Report
After updating, fetches full stats from Sheets and sends a
Telegram summary including Scout, Scout Controller, remaining
scans, days until target date, and scans-per-day targets.

### /scout Command
Telegram command to manually trigger the stats report.

label: 💚 Node-Red HealthCheck Flow
info:
# Healthcheck Flow

- Provides a simple __HTTP GET__ API `/health`
- Returns __HTTP 200__ response with body "OK"

Improvements over original:
1. Filters at query level (no split/switch needed)
2. Only targets lights in 'on' state
3. Single batched service call instead of per-light calls
4. Status indicator shows count of lights turned off
5. Logs which lights were turned off (node.warn)
6. Skips Bambu P1S chamber light if a print job is active (running, prepare, slicing, or paused)

name: ═══ 🍖 FEEDING DETECTION ═══  Container open → time check → MQTT publish (5min debounce)
info:
When the dog food container is opened, determine if it's a morning (6am-12pm) or evening feeding, timestamp it, and publish to the appropriate MQTT topic.

A 5-minute debounce prevents duplicate triggers from repeated lid opens (treats, refilling, etc).

name: 🌅 Timestamp Morning
🌙 Timestamp Evening
═══ ✅ FOLLOW-UP ═══  If a reminder was sent, notify that Gabby has now been fed
info: When the container opens after a reminder was sent, send a follow-up Telegram message confirming Gabby has been fed. Checks both morning and evening reminder flags independently.

name: 🔔 Check Reminders Pending
═══ ⏰ FEEDING REMINDERS ═══  Check at 11:00 AM and 8:00 PM, alert via Telegram if not fed
info: Scheduled checks to verify Gabby has been fed. If the corresponding HA binary_sensor is not 'on', a Telegram notification is sent and the appropriate reminder flag is set.

name: 📢 Set Morning Reminder
📢 Set Evening Reminder
═══ 🌙 MIDNIGHT RESET ═══  Clear MQTT topics and reminder flags
info: At midnight, clear both retained MQTT topics (morning and evening) and reset the reminder-sent flags so the next day starts fresh.

❄️ Alert Logic
📡 Stale Alert
🥶 Alert Logic
📡 Stale Alert
━━━ 📋 HOW IT WORKS ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
info:
SENSORS: Acurite 986 via RTL_433 on tartlet → MQTT → HA

ALERT LOGIC:
• Tracks continuous time above thresholds using flow context
• Won't fire until temp stays elevated for the full duration
• If temp dips below threshold and rises again, timer resets
• Rate-limited: repeats at most every 30 minutes
• Sends recovery notification when temp returns to normal

STALE DETECTION:
• Trigger node resets its 30-min timer on every valid reading
• If no reading arrives in 30 min → offline alert
• When readings resume → online recovery message

THRESHOLDS (edit in function nodes):
  Freezer:  Warning >10°F/10min  |  Critical >20°F/6min
  Fridge:   Warning >50°F/10min  |  Critical >60°F/6min

TELEGRAM: Sends to both chat IDs (321474212, 247971390)

name: 🎅 Holiday Season?
🗓️ Holiday Season Config
info:
Date range is configurable via flow context:

  flow.set('holidayStartMonth', 11)
  flow.set('holidayStartDay', 25)
  flow.set('holidayEndMonth', 1)
  flow.set('holidayEndDay', 6)

Default: November 25 – January 6

Set these in a separate inject → function
node at deploy time, or edit defaults
directly in the Is Holiday Season? function.

name: Are all lights off?
func:
let light_count = msg.payload.length

let lights_off_count = msg.payload.filter(light => light.state === 'off').length

msg.payload = light_count == lights_off_count

return msg;
